clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’ll keep this email short. Far-right Republicans started passing extreme voter suppression bills in 48 states. National Republicans CRUSHED our landmark Voting Rights bill, H.R. 1. National Republicans have their eyes on Democrats like me who won’t bend to their voter suppression tactics. Voting Rights are on the line right now and we can’t afford to lose our Democratic House Majority when so much hangs in the balance. | | | | | | | I can’t thank you enough! \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Team Scott Fitzgerald
subject: CONVENTION SPEECH sneak peak...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
[What's he going to say?] Congressman Fitzgerald will be taking the stage in just a few hours to address the Wisconsin GOP convention... _and we've got a sneak peak of what he's going to say! _But first, would you be willing to join us this convention weekend to turn speech into **ACTION?** We're fighting to make our party stronger and WIN next November. Will you help? **[Click here to join us- donate at any amount to make it a success!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-r/)** [Convention Weekend - Grassroots Level [CLICK HERE]](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Convention Weekend - Attendee Level [CLICK HERE]](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Convention Weekend - Member Level [CLICK HERE]](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-t/) If you clicked on one of those buttons above, here's an excerpt from Congressman Fitzgerald's speech:
> _" We're just FIVE SEATS away from blocking **Joe Biden 's** liberal big government until 2024... __" We're FIVE SEATS away from making **the "Squad"** irrelevant again... __" And we're FIVE SEATS away from sending **Nancy Pelosi** back home to San Francisco... for good!"__...__" Last November, we won a dozen more seats than anybody in the liberal media thought we would.__" And every seat we flipped last cycle was with a Republican who is a woman, a minority, or a veteran._**_" But the path to victory in 2022 is only possible if we're willing to work for it!"_**
Even if you didn't attend the convention in person this weekend, **YOU CAN STILL JOIN THE FIGHT AND MAKE A DIFFERENCE, NO MATTER WHERE YOU ARE!**[**Please, CLICK HERE to help us take back the House, grow our party, _and take back Washington in 2022!_**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-i/) -Team Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-u/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-clrdjdt-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-clrdjdt-ahkdjtlkr-b/)
---

Unfortunately, they’re probably right -- historically, the year after Democrats win the White House, Republicans tend to do well here in the Commonwealth. And that pattern is part of why everyone watches Virginia’s elections: Because what happens to Virginia Democrats this year is a good indicator of what’s waiting for Democrats at the national level next year.

That’s why we need your help _right now_ , Derek. **[Will you make a contribution today to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal and keep Virginia BLUE this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31477051/292777283/1637338252?refcode=ris_20210627_e_f_us_na_na_eoq538nd&refcode2=dpva&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzJlNTEwMC00OWQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4SAesT1wPH3je3PQsgXZ6dg1d9Vl6pLp9jRaMrxAZg=)**

The GOP is going to throw everything they have at us to try to flip Virginia from blue to red. Let’s make sure we’re ready for them.

Thanks for your support,
Team DPVA

Thanks for your support, Team DPVA = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: See you today for RINO Roast!
body:
The weather will clear up in plenty of time for our BBQ today!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ohCYc3EE87NdP0bcEneXQztO3-qNB2lFMt9M8USCNRU9ua9_05oPYQXHoIrgtFsm7nHkLY9Mif5G2r-ezMX-g38WBBy7os3LCZagz9oUuMmAn2n5_3ZiEFZpDaUAp5_xte1ZW0m6HsBpCk3r--X0Xo2ODCPsfui_mwEA_KzR1Oo9syudiNZYvzyc6nrE4fwlHSKRQZTlPcF-0-y0bW5G8fNPt2u3ycfhyhN6gm97wUBgHLNBJyNOFw==&c=PEWD7jJLOiqBR-FyDbMi8N0ulsmERroUKWy3_Aw1T5Olwu-gQX7IWw==&ch=cNqMF9zQtKZDQ-_vZjaqqPzUeSxw8WPAlxT_7TRb17f10cJFzMizVA==)
---
| Fellow Conservative,
You know the story. One year ago, an angry mob marched onto my property and threatened to kill my family and burn down my house. My wife Patty and I held them off by exercising our 2nd Amendment rights.
And to celebrate the ONE YEAR anniversary of the event, we're throwing a big party tomorrow, and you're invited! So come out and join us later today (Sunday) from 2-8 at Drive in St. Louis, check out the details below!
The weather will clear up before 2 PM, so come out and enjoy great food, music, and conversation today!
We'll be gathered (WITHOUT MASKS) to talk about the direction of the country, winning back the SENATE from the socialist Democrats, and how we can keep the Republican Party clear of RINO'S now and in the future. So come out, eat some great barbecue, and celebrate our freedom with fellow Conservatives in Missouri.
If you're in or around St. Louis, we'd LOVE for you to drop by so we can meet you. There will be food, live music and adult beverages provided, along with special guest Congressman Madison Cawthorn!
Click the button below to reserve your ticket.
---
| | | [RESERVE YOUR TICKET NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ohCYc3EE87NdP0bcEneXQztO3-qNB2lFMt9M8USCNRU9ua9_05oPYQXHoIrgtFsm7nHkLY9Mif5G2r-ezMX-g38WBBy7os3LCZagz9oUuMmAn2n5_3ZiEFZpDaUAp5_xte1ZW0m6HsBpCk3r--X0Xo2ODCPsfui_mwEA_KzR1Oo9syudiNZYvzyc6nrE4fwlHSKRQZTlPcF-0-y0bW5G8fNPt2u3ycfhyhN6gm97wUBgHLNBJyNOFw==&c=PEWD7jJLOiqBR-FyDbMi8N0ulsmERroUKWy3_Aw1T5Olwu-gQX7IWw==&ch=cNqMF9zQtKZDQ-_vZjaqqPzUeSxw8WPAlxT_7TRb17f10cJFzMizVA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ohCYc3EE87NdP0bcEneXQztO3-qNB2lFMt9M8USCNRU9ua9_05oPYQXHoIrgtFsm7nHkLY9Mif5G2r-ezMX-g38WBBy7os3LCZagz9oUuMmAn2n5_3ZiEFZpDaUAp5_xte1ZW0m6HsBpCk3r--X0Xo2ODCPsfui_mwEA_KzR1Oo9syudiNZYvzyc6nrE4fwlHSKRQZTlPcF-0-y0bW5G8fNPt2u3ycfhyhN6gm97wUBgHLNBJyNOFw==&c=PEWD7jJLOiqBR-FyDbMi8N0ulsmERroUKWy3_Aw1T5Olwu-gQX7IWw==&ch=cNqMF9zQtKZDQ-_vZjaqqPzUeSxw8WPAlxT_7TRb17f10cJFzMizVA==)

For America,
Mark McCloskey

name: Liz Olson
subject: Re: Leading the charge
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/M4ZPqtVObOhdI2k8-xd_oI2DokJu2Z1PfJVxv2VFfpI=/wpKjzyGx1G7unL28PAuSG_56MwOBBVGi0EQcbHIcpfk=?refcode=062721)
| | Friend, As we approach the end of Pride Month, we wanted to make sure you saw our last email. Our House DFL Majority will stand up for LGBTQ+ Minnesotans. Will you make a contribution today so that we can continue to lead the way? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M4ZPqtVObOhdI2k8-xd_oI2DokJu2Z1PfJVxv2VFfpI=/wpKjzyGx1G7unL28PAuSG_56MwOBBVGi0EQcbHIcpfk=?refcode=062721) Thank you, Liz Olson Deputy Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **House DFL Team **<house@dflhouse.com>
Date: Sat, June 26, 2021 at 2:35 PM Subject: Leading the charge Friend, Our House DFL family is proud to be strong allies and members of the LGBTQ+ community. There is a large influx of anti-transgender and other anti-LGBTQ+ policies being enacted all across the country. If Republicans had control of the Legislature, we would likely have seen more of these discriminatory proposals right here at home. That is why the election next year is so important and that's why we need your support. [__Minnesotans: you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and receive a refund from the state once per year.__](https://act.myngp.com/el/M4ZPqtVObOhdI2k8-xd_oI2DokJu2Z1PfJVxv2VFfpI=/wpKjzyGx1G7unL28PAuSG_56MwOBBVGi0EQcbHIcpfk=?refcode=062721) From legalizing marriage equality to leading the charge against conversion therapy, the House DFL will always be dedicated allies to the LBGTQ+ community. **Will you help us continue fighting for equality? ** [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M4ZPqtVObOhdI2k8-xd_oI2DokJu2Z1PfJVxv2VFfpI=/wpKjzyGx1G7unL28PAuSG_56MwOBBVGi0EQcbHIcpfk=?refcode=062721) Everything is on the line next year and currently our House DFL Majority is the only thing stopping another amendment question, like the one to ban marriage equality in 2012, from reaching the ballot. We need to act now to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ Minnesotans. Thank you, House DFL Team [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M4ZPqtVObOhdI2k8-xd_oI2DokJu2Z1PfJVxv2VFfpI=/wpKjzyGx1G7unL28PAuSG_56MwOBBVGi0EQcbHIcpfk=?refcode=062721)
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.
---

name: Dave Kubal
subject: Pray for President Trump
body:
Peter, [**Will you please sign your PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815061:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) Together we will lift up President Trump in prayer, thanking God for all that He has done through our 45th President. I know for a fact that President Trump cherishes notes of prayer just like this one. Over the past year we have seen hundreds of thousands of Americans just like you join our team to pray for President Trump. Now that he's no longer in the White House, I believe we owe him a debt of gratitude for standing firmly in faith and fighting for our shared Christian conservative values. As you well know, President Trump endures relentless personal and spiritual attacks still to this very day. We've seen these attacks appear in many different ways...
* Attacks from liberal "Big Tech" billionaires who want to silence President Trump and other outspoken champions of our Christian faith.
* Attacks from the "fake news" media spinning biased stories against him, his family, and his political allies.
* And attacks from liberal politicians who desperately want to erase his pro-faith, pro-family, and pro-freedom legacy.

Today I need your help as a prayer leader within your community to combat all these attacks on President Trump by blanketing his Florida home at Mar-a-Lago with around the clock prayer protection. So please, join my prayer team for President Trump and uplift him with a personal note to sustain and encourage him. [**Please sign your personal PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815061:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) ** ** As you know, while the results of the last presidential election are disputable, there's no disputing President Trump's record of accomplishments:
* **More than 230 Faithful Conservative Judges** nominated and confirmed onto the courts including Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett.
* **U.S. Embassy moved to Jerusalem** in direct recognition of the rightful capital of America's greatest ally, Israel.
* **Protected the Sanctity of Life** by working tirelessly to prevent government funding of abortion including reinstating and expanding the Mexico City Policy which prevents taxpayer funding of abortion globally.
* **And so many more ...**

Won't you please join us as we thank President Trump and let him know just how much you appreciate all that he did for us? [**Sign your PRAYER NOTE FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP and use the extra space provided to send him a special message of thanks and encouragement.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815061:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) As believers, we must join together and cry out to our Heavenly Father to:
* Keep President Trump safe from the enemy's snares and traps (Psalm 141:9 - 10).
* Ensure President Trump would show no fear toward the evil that assails him (Isaiah 8:12), but rather overcome it with a zeal and passion for His laws which bring life and liberty to all (Proverbs 10:29 - 32).
* Grant President Trump increased grace and blessing as he heeds His voice and obeys His Word (Proverbs 21:1).

My name is David Kubal, and I'm blessed to be the President and CEO of Intercessors for America (IFA). Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize nationwide prayer warriors with information and tools to unite them in effective prayer. I'm counting on you to step up, take action, and join your brothers and sisters in Christ as together we lift up President Trump in prayer to our Lord and Savior - and let him know we are doing it. To date IFA has already offered up more than 100,000 prayers for President Trump - thanks to Spirit-led prayer warriors just like you. Together, we will honor God, lift up President Trump in prayer, and give thanks for all his wonderful accomplishments we've witnessed over the last four years. Thank you for being a prayer warrior I can count on. God Bless, David Kubal President & CEO Intercessors for America (IFA) [ **SIGN THE PRAYER CARD NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815061:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815061:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) Intercessors for America (IFA) is a 501(c)(3) ministry organization and was founded in 1973 when God impressed upon the hearts of a group of godly, respected men the necessity of prayer and fasting. | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815062:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815063:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815064:JYJGKhl3N:m:1:3253819041:7FBA669B5F1DBADCC40047F17AE3B3B4:r)
---|---|---

P.O. Box 915 Purcellville, VA 20134

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: our next FEC quarterly fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
I would not ask if it were not important.
#

**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our next FEC quarterly fundraising deadline – which is on Wednesday. My team has set a goal to raise $50,000 by then, after which we are legally mandated to publicly report our fundraising numbers.**
Let me explain why a contribution – of any amount – will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-june-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31486411/292803531/-799468273?refcode2=cbedb4d0-58d7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210627-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVkYjRkMC01OGQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Nx0Ha-Ww5bhoDint4h30FatWlH51dYdEmFShXCxrqU=)**).
This month and this quarter have been exciting for our movement. We are finally seeing the end of the tunnel of the COVID-19 pandemic, as more and more Americans have received the vaccine.
We have passed legislation that has been, and will be, transformative for working Americans, and my new Policy is Personal PAC is helping elect bold, progressive leaders at all levels of government.
Yet these have been trying times. We are fighting against an obstructionist GOP Senate minority with a handful of conservative Democrats serving as accomplices, protecting the Jim Crow filibuster and dooming the passage of most substantive policy.
Even in the face of such obstacles, we can’t let the status quo remain. My constituents elected me to get things done — and I’m proud to have been named the most active freshman member in the entire Congress. I will not back down from this fight to build a country where working people can thrive, not just survive.
So here’s where you can help: after Wednesday, my team is federally mandated to publicly report our fundraising numbers. At this point in the campaign cycle, we can expect challengers from any party to jump in the race — and if we don’t meet our fundraising goals, people will surely notice and try to capitalize on that.
**Meeting each and every one of our fundraising goals allows me to stay focused on the critical work of legislating, allows our team to prepare for any challenge that may come our way this cycle, and allows our movement to be as strong a force as possible.**
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal ahead of the legally-mandated reporting deadline. I would not ask if it were not important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31486412/292803532/-799468273?refcode2=cbedb4d0-58d7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210627-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmVkYjRkMC01OGQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Nx0Ha-Ww5bhoDint4h30FatWlH51dYdEmFShXCxrqU=)**
I’m confident that our people-powered movement will win again this cycle – but only with your help.

clean_body: I would not ask if it were not important. I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our next FEC quarterly fundraising deadline – which is on Wednesday. My team has set a goal to raise $50,000 by then, after which we are legally mandated to publicly report our fundraising numbers. Let me explain why a contribution – of any amount – will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: =). This month and this quarter have been exciting for our movement. We are finally seeing the end of the tunnel of the COVID-19 pandemic, as more and more Americans have received the vaccine. We have passed legislation that has been, and will be, transformative for working Americans, and my new Policy is Personal PAC is helping elect bold, progressive leaders at all levels of government. Yet these have been trying times. We are fighting against an obstructionist GOP Senate minority with a handful of conservative Democrats serving as accomplices, protecting the Jim Crow filibuster and dooming the passage of most substantive policy. Even in the face of such obstacles, we can’t let the status quo remain. My constituents elected me to get things done — and I’m proud to have been named the most active freshman member in the entire Congress. I will not back down from this fight to build a country where working people can thrive, not just survive. So here’s where you can help: after Wednesday, my team is federally mandated to publicly report our fundraising numbers. At this point in the campaign cycle, we can expect challengers from any party to jump in the race — and if we don’t meet our fundraising goals, people will surely notice and try to capitalize on that. Meeting each and every one of our fundraising goals allows me to stay focused on the critical work of legislating, allows our team to prepare for any challenge that may come our way this cycle, and allows our movement to be as strong a force as possible. = I’m confident that our people-powered movement will win again this cycle – but only with your help. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31487602/292808679/-392876194?refcode=em0627_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4ZmJkYy01YmQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKHZaicoiUaLM-vISd605Lj8uBShAPEMqFVVDjau-ls=) Hi team, Our team at The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiative campaigns in just five years, changing over 17 million lives in red, purple, and blue states where out-of-touch politicians refused to act. We’ve made real progress expanding health care, raising wages, and guaranteeing paid leave. **But now, the special interests and extremist politicians have seen our wins and are trying to change the rules._They’re attacking democracy._** In South Dakota, they’re trying to require 60% to win. In Idaho, they’re making it way more expensive to collect signatures. In other states, they’re requiring signatures to be collected on petitions the size of beach towels! **We’re fighting back against these partisan attacks -- but we need your help.** **On Wednesday, we face one of the biggest fundraising deadlines of the year. We’re setting a goal to raise $5,000 in grassroots donations before midnight on Wednesday so we have what it takes to beat these attacks on our voting rights and keep winning campaigns to change lives.** **[Can you chip in before Wednesday's fundraising deadline? Every dollar will help us fight back against these extreme attacks on your right to make your voice heard, and will help us win more campaigns for health care, higher wages, and more.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31487603/292808680/-392876194?refcode=em0627_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4ZmJkYy01YmQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKHZaicoiUaLM-vISd605Lj8uBShAPEMqFVVDjau-ls=)** | **[Chip in →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31487604/292808681/-392876194?refcode=em0627_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4ZmJkYy01YmQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKHZaicoiUaLM-vISd605Lj8uBShAPEMqFVVDjau-ls=)**

We’ve made real progress expanding health care, raising wages, and guaranteeing paid leave. But now, the special interests and extremist politicians have seen our wins and are trying to change the rules.They’re attacking democracy. In South Dakota, they’re trying to require 60% to win. In Idaho, they’re making it way more expensive to collect signatures. In other states, they’re requiring signatures to be collected on petitions the size of beach towels! We’re fighting back against these partisan attacks -- but we need your help. On Wednesday, we face one of the biggest fundraising deadlines of the year. We’re setting a goal to raise $5,000 in grassroots donations before midnight on Wednesday so we have what it takes to beat these attacks on our voting rights and keep winning campaigns to change lives. = | = Together, we’re going to hit this grassroots goal before Wednesday’s critical deadline -- then we’re going to tackle these petty attacks and win more campaigns across the country to change lives. name: Vanessa Clifford
subject: Emails like this are how we fund this movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I’ve been keeping a close eye on our fundraising numbers
#

Hi friend —
I’ve been keeping a close eye on our fundraising numbers. And I’m sorry to tell you that we're a bit behind pace on our end-of-quarter goal right now.
**Let me explain why I'm worried:**
Friend, we thoughtfully calculate each fundraising goal we set. That means our goal of 20,000 donations isn't arbitrary.
It's the goal we need to reach in order to show everyone watching this race — _the pundits and our opponents_ — that we have what it takes to go the distance.
The money we raise goes towards building a statewide coalition of working people who believe our government should work for them, not corporations and special interest groups.
And since we are a grassroots campaign, we're counting on all of these donations to come in from everyday folks like you.
**So I'm personally asking for your help. If more people don't step up, I'm afraid we might fall short.**
[Could you chip in now to help us crush this goal? We need about 100 people to pitch in by midnight to put things back on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31487739/292809202/-347207331?refcode2=0e41748f-5cd7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210627-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQxNzQ4Zi01Y2Q3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JgFT0rfwALFocg1owZ73FYn6WKV_u-NJcDnnSftiQWs=)

Emails like this are how we fund this movement, so your support today means everything.
Thank you,
Vanessa Clifford
Campaign Manager
Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate

name: Susan Wild
subject: quick request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but we only have a couple of days until the FEC quarterly filing deadline.

| Hi Peter,

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but we only have a couple of days until the FEC quarterly filing deadline.

That means we have to publicly report our fundraising numbers -- and now that my Republican opponent has officially launched her campaign, her team will be looking for any sign of weakness.

I’m so grateful for the support I’ve received from grassroots donors like you already, but we are still $5,000 behind our goal and running out of time to get there. We need to prove the strength of our grassroots efforts and show Republicans we intend to win.

Peter, anything you can give before the deadline would mean a lot to me and my team. **You can donate at this secure link:[_wildforcongress.com/EOQGoal_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31487893/292809801/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210627-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWExMzAxZS01ZGQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6gXFT2fGAek7JcgghAq-QBsZze5y2Hl5wFLr2i0N7W4=)**

Thank you,

_Susan Wild_

| | Folks, Two is a special number for this team. We flipped this district by just over 2 points in 2018. And in the midst of a pandemic that changed everything for our community and our campaign, we went up against over $3 million in outside spending and won a second time around in 2020. **I know we have what it takes to defend this seat again in 2022** \-- but I’ll be honest, we’ve got an uphill fight ahead of us. I’m a top target for national Republicans, I’m facing multiple GOP opponents, _and_ VA-02 was just rated an R+1 district. **This race gets more competitive every cycle -- we need all hands on deck to build the strong foundation we need for an Election Day win. We're just _3 days_ away from our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. $2 may not seem like enough to go up against outside GOP groups and their nearly unlimited dark money.
But if my twenty years in the Navy taught me anything, it’s that there’s nothing more powerful than teamwork -- and the battle for our democracy is no different.
Every dollar adds up. By the time you’re done reading this email, someone will have just donated $2 and someone else will too.
**When we join together, we can accomplish more than we could ever dream of achieving on our own.[Will you chip in $2 or more so that we can keep fighting to rebuild our economy, preserve our environment, and ensure our veterans get the benefits they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31488062/292810616/-1706311638?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210627_FR_2forVA02_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWE1ZjVmNC01ZGQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oOhrzYyZDcTqScYhEjNCTcH5o5Pv0KZgOteKOtPJmI8=)**

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Two is a special number for this team. We flipped this district by just over 2 points in 2018. And in the midst of a pandemic that changed everything for our community and our campaign, we went up against over $3 million in outside spending and won a second time around in 2020. I know we have what it takes to defend this seat again in 2022 \-- but I’ll be honest, we’ve got an uphill fight ahead of us. I’m a top target for national Republicans, I’m facing multiple GOP opponents, and VA-02 was just rated an R+1 district. This race gets more competitive every cycle -- we need all hands on deck to build the strong foundation we need for an Election Day win. We're just 3 days away from our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. = | | | = | | = $2 may not seem like enough to go up against outside GOP groups and their nearly unlimited dark money. But if my twenty years in the Navy taught me anything, it’s that there’s nothing more powerful than teamwork -- and the battle for our democracy is no different. Every dollar adds up. By the time you’re done reading this email, someone will have just donated $2 and someone else will too. When we join together, we can accomplish more than we could ever dream of achieving on our own.= | | = | | = I can’t thank you enough for your support, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . name: Erica Smith
subject: The blessing of the DSCC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
On June 30, I am required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised during the second fiscal quarter of the year.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica again.
With the FEC deadline just around 72 hours away, Jayla asked me to reach out and tell you exactly why we must reach our goal of 500 online donations before June 30.
**So please let me explain why[ _making your first donation of $5 to help reach our goal is so incredibly critical..._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210627-209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)**
On June 30, I am required by federal law to report how much money our campaign raised during the second fiscal quarter of the year. Once our Q2 fundraising numbers become public information, everyone will see and make judgements about the strength of our unapologetic North Carolina campaign.
Remember, unlike other campaigns in this primary for the U.S. Senate, we don’t have a rolodex of rich and well-connected donors to turn to. And we certainly don’t have the blessing of the DSCC or the establishment. **That’s why raising a massive fundraising haul by June 30 is essential to prove to the Democratic establishment that our campaign has what it takes to win.**
Meanwhile, we’re also up against the GOP. Donald Trump recently endorsed insurrectionist apologist Ted Budd. We know the Republicans will do anything to keep this Senate seat. Already, a GOP super PAC raised $5,000,000 toward winning this seat.
Finally, let’s be real with ourselves. Big, structural change is urgently needed in North Carolina, and I’m the ONLY candidate in this race who supports a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All. All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting for these transformative changes. Send me to Washington and I’ll get the job done — and I’d be the first Black woman Senator from the South to serve in the U.S. Senate, _ever_.
**But in order to get there, we must meet our goal of raising 500 campaign contributions in the next 72 hours to prove our campaign is viable and has what it takes to win our primary. We’re pretty close...**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210627-209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)
If we can hit our 500 contributions goal by June 30, it’ll show that our AWESOME team has the momentum to win this Senate Seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I am respectfully asking:
[**_Is there any chance you can please send your first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. in North Carolina? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 500 contribution goal._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210627-209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3379?refcode=em20210627-209&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)**
Thank you, thank you from the bottom of my heart for supporting our scrappy, unapologetic campaign.
— Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210627-209-footer&t=23&refcode2=209_3698_v-BAz9&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=209%2E3698%2Ev-BAz9)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I can beat Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter, I keep trying to campaign against Ron Johnson, but he's doing the work for me! Just take a look at what he's done recently:
* Was suspended from YouTube for pushing COVID-19 conspiracies;
* Promised to block a bipartisan infrastructure package;
* Voted against the For the People Act;
* Was booed at a Juneteenth event after his opposition to making it a federal holiday;
* Promised to block DC statehood;
* And that's just in the past few weeks!

| | Derek,

I want to make sure you know about a Senate race that is absolutely crucial if we are going to hold the Senate. I'm talking about reelecting my good friend Sen. Maggie Hassan of New Hampshire.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: "Marjorie Taylor Greene will be defeated"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter -- I'm sick and tired of radical Democrats not being
held accountable.
Every single day in the halls of Congress,
I'm fighting to do exactly that:
Impeach Joe Biden.
Expel Maxine Waters.
Fire Fauci.
And because I refuse to back down and shut
up, Democrats have painted a big red target on my back. . .
In fact, they're on pace to spend TENS OF
MILLIONS of dollars to take me out.
DEFEND MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE - CHIP IN
17.76 BEFORE END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE
They've even recruited Democrat National
Committee Super Delegate Wendy Davis to defeat me in 2022.

In just 3 days, I have one of the most
critical fundraising deadlines in my political career: the
End-of-Quarter reports.

These reports are what Democrat operatives
and Fake News "journalists" comb through just to see how strong
my support is amongst the people.
They use these reports to allocate Democrat
resources amongst the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.
They even deploy Democrats from across the
country to knock doors, make phone calls, write emails, and
spread Fake News on social media. . .
All in an effort to defeat me in 2022!
As you can see, I strongly need your help,
Peter.
You've stood with me before. I must ask you
to stand with me again right now by chipping in 17.76 to help
me DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS.
Please hurry, the deadline is just 3 short
days. . .
The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger
chance I have to fend off Hillary Clinton's and Stacey Abrams'
Democrats.
I am fighting every single day to stop these
socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and
rebuild it into their socialist hellhole.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
Can I can count on you to chip in 17.76
right now?
Wendy Davis is an open-borders socialist who
supports stimulus checks to Illegal Immigrants, teaching our
children to hate America through dangerous Critical Race Theory
indoctrination, violent BLM and Antifa mobs, and wants to strip
away our gun rights.
She is handpicked by the Hillary
Clinton/Stacey Abrams wing of the Democrat party.
They are prepared to unleash MILLIONS of
dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect
$15-$20 million spent against me. . .
And not just the Democrats.
The Never Trump Lincoln Project and the Liz
Cheney wing of the Republican party want me gone.

This is exactly why I must ask you to chip in
17.76 right now.
Help me fight back and take a stand. Let's
take back America and Defeat the Democrats!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Ian Prior
subject: meet the “chardonnay antifa”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by FightforSchools
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r) | |
---
Peter,

Forget reading, writing, and arithmetic. **Here's what America's kids are learning in public schools:**
* America is a racist country.
* If you are white, you are a racist by definition.
* And if you support American ideals like free speech or hard work, you are _**definitely**_ racist.

This horrifying ideology is called "critical race theory." It's creeping into classrooms across the country. And if you stand up to it - the woke mob comes for you.

_I should know, because it happened to me._

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)

After standing up to this insane addition to the curriculum in Loudoun County, Virginia at a school board meeting, I was among the parents put on a "hit list" by local activists and threatened with cybercrime.

_But I 'm not the only one that's rising up._

Have you noticed that a new viral video of a parent taking on their school board seems to break every day on social media? It's no wonder: **America's public schools are completely out of control.**

Let's review the past year of public school performance:
* Unaccountable and confusing school shutdowns.
* Mass academic failure after a year in remote schools.
* Kids struggling emotionally after a year of social isolation.

And how do school boards and school administrations react to those very real problems?

By ignoring those issues and spending millions to teach our children to judge people NOT by the content of their character, but by the color of their skin. That's what they think the real emergency is. It's outrageous.

**Instead of educating them, they are teaching our children to hate America. AND YOU'RE PAYING FOR IT.**

That's why I'm mobilizing parents across the country to fund the battles that matter most so we can take back our schools. **[Will you join the fight today by making a donation?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)**
|
---
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $75
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)
[**TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)
|
---
Let me explain to you what your dollar will do. **I've got a concrete plan for parents to take back control of our public schools.** It's why I started FightforSchools.

Your donation will directly support the parent revolution that's happening across the country by:
* Organizing parents across the country to fight back.
* Equipping those parents with the resources they need to activate their neighbors.

* And financially supporting expensive electoral recalls and legal challenges to out of control school officials.

**This is an issue that 's bigger than politics.** It's not just a bunch of Republican activists - the parents we work with come from all walks of life and political persuasions. It's a common sense issue. **[And it's why WE WILL WIN.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)**
|
---
[**HELP ME TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)
|
---
Thank you,

Ian Prior
Founder, FightforSchools

P.S. We often say "freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction" - and if we let these schools continue to run rampant, Peter, this is an extinction event. The next generation won't know a thing about America. It's why I'm asking you: please, donate to our efforts at this secure URL today, before it is too late: **[https://fightforschools-com-cd0f5005.revv.co/action-158416](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57815130:6QyKhhl4N:m:1:3253819041:431DF0D51F702E1A7F19B479F05109D6:r)**

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Thanks for reading this on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yVpaEwQE6mdc5bxrpQVIOIMT2gs-Ze9Q_7gdKiZYGKk=/THPS7rSlZLS5jqSwNHx6B4BFBGO8siwYkxJDnejm5nU=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Peter, I do my best not to email you on Sundays, but we have an important fundraising deadline coming up next week so this really can't wait.
I'm sure you're hearing from lots of candidates and campaigns about the June 30 deadline, but I'd like to take a moment to explain what that deadline means and why it's so critical.
Democrats are currently holding onto the House majority by only a handful of seats, and it is anticipated that Republican gerrymandering in the upcoming redistricting process will further impact that razor-thin margin. Republican strategists and operatives know they have a real chance to take back the House next year and are currently researching Democratic incumbents to see who might be vulnerable to a Republican challenger.
While we can't control who they will target, we can build a preemptive defense by posting strong fundraising numbers.
We've been working hard since January, and, thanks to you, are off to a solid start. But we can't let our momentum slide now and leave the door wide open for a Republican challenger.
We need to do all we can to retain the House majority, and that means posting strong numbers once again.
Please help us protect the Democratic majority by[** _donating to my campaign here._** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/yVpaEwQE6mdc5bxrpQVIOIMT2gs-Ze9Q_7gdKiZYGKk=/THPS7rSlZLS5jqSwNHx6B4BFBGO8siwYkxJDnejm5nU=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Your donation now will make all the difference in the type of race we will face next fall.
Thank you for standing with our Democrat majority and for your support.
Sincerely,
Salud

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
---
Salud Carbajal for Congress
P.O. Box 1290
Santa Barbara CA 93102 United States
info@saludcarbajal.com

subject: here to stay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#

Hi there, team. I know you’re getting fundraising emails from folks all over the country as we approach the end-of-quarter, so I wanted to explain to you why you should donate to our campaign. Every dollar you donate to our campaign stays right here in Texas. It is spent building on years of hard work and investment by people like you to deliver for the people of Texas. In 2018, Mike ran the closest race for Lt. Governor in TWO DECADES and nearly beat him. In 2022, we’re working to finish the job. Imagine all the good that can happen (and the bad that won’t happen) if we elect Mike as Texas’ next Lt. Governor! With a broad, diverse coalition ready for progress, we can build a future that represents all Texans. But we cannot do it without you, so we’re asking: **Team, this is our most important deadline of the year. clean_body: | Hi there, team. I know you’re getting fundraising emails from folks all over the country as we approach the end-of-quarter, so I wanted to explain to you why you should donate to our campaign. Every dollar you donate to our campaign stays right here in Texas. It is spent building on years of hard work and investment by people like you to deliver for the people of Texas. In 2018, Mike ran the closest race for Lt. Governor in TWO DECADES and nearly beat him. In 2022, we’re working to finish the job. Imagine all the good that can happen (and the bad that won’t happen) if we elect Mike as Texas’ next Lt. Governor! With a broad, diverse coalition ready for progress, we can build a future that represents all Texans. But we cannot do it without you, so we’re asking: Team, this is our most important deadline of the year. Can we count on you to contribute $5 or any amount to help hit our TEC goal before Wednesday? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = More than any Senator or Representative, electing Mike as Lt. Governor will change the trajectory of Texas. No more bathroom bills. No attacks on our public schools. No efforts to deny voting rights. No bills to allow criminals to carry guns. That is a promise. Thanks for being part of this movement. Ali Zaidi Deputy Campaign Manager Mike Collier for Texas The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

body:
This is an urgent moment for our future so I won’t mince words.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31493984/292834088/-2023814932?refcode=20210627.2_MW_CD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E1NDEyNC03MWQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hPChpLs5bGqeSeQe1E1XCgk7J8hG0aEnjYQSepPgrs0=)

| | Derek, this is a make or break moment for the Commonwealth. I’m proud to support Terry McAuliffe to be our next Governor and I need you with me. Virginia has made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership, but we know that progress is fragile. So here’s the bottom line:

Election experts are saying this race will be too close to call. We know Republicans and their nominee will have an unlimited amount of cash to buy up Virginia’s airwaves and smear Terry. That means if we don’t step up and make sure Terry’s campaign has the resources to fight back, he could lose and Trumpism will be on the rise in Virginia.

**[Can you donate anything you can afford to help make sure Terry McAuliffe is Virginia's next Governor? We have to come together to protect our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31493985/292834089/1097049879?refcode=20210627.2_MW_CD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E1NDEyNC03MWQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hPChpLs5bGqeSeQe1E1XCgk7J8hG0aEnjYQSepPgrs0=)**

Terry was an incredible Governor for Virginia and he will be again. Under his leadership, Virginia’s economy saw historic growth. A record number of voting rights were restored. And over and over again, Terry stood as a brick wall to stop extreme elements in the Virginia Republican legislature.

But now, as Terry takes on a well-funded, Trump-backed Republican nominee for Governor, that is all on the line.

**[This is an urgent moment for Virginia’s future. clean_body: This is an urgent moment for our future so I won’t mince words. | | | = | | Derek, this is a make or break moment for the Commonwealth. I’m proud to support Terry McAuliffe to be our next Governor and I need you with me. Virginia has made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership, but we know that progress is fragile. So here’s the bottom line: Election experts are saying this race will be too close to call. We know Republicans and their nominee will have an unlimited amount of cash to buy up Virginia’s airwaves and smear Terry. That means if we don’t step up and make sure Terry’s campaign has the resources to fight back, he could lose and Trumpism will be on the rise in Virginia. = Terry was an incredible Governor for Virginia and he will be again. Under his leadership, Virginia’s economy saw historic growth. A record number of voting rights were restored. And over and over again, Terry stood as a brick wall to stop extreme elements in the Virginia Republican legislature. But now, as Terry takes on a well-funded, Trump-backed Republican nominee for Governor, that is all on the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Mark Warner = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: We’re Mitch McConnell’s top targets
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hello,
We’re in a bit of a tough spot, so Mark suggested I reach out to you as one of his top supporters.
You see, National Republicans only need to flip one seat to take control of the U.S. Senate — and Mark and I are at the top of their list of targets. Mitch McConnell and his right-wing allies are already spending big on attack ads, and public polls are showing tight, single-digit races.
**Control of the Senate could come down to New Hampshire and Arizona.**
We check our fundraising numbers every day and in races this close, with the stakes this high, we’re going to need every dollar we can get. [**That’s why I’m asking you personally, can you please split $3 between me and Mark Kelly to help us defend these seats?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-jun21?refcode=em210627-1-15&t=1&refcode2=850_6688874_XXZPbW&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210627-1-15&t=14&refcode2=850_6688874_XXZPbW&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210627-1-15&t=15&refcode2=850_6688874_XXZPbW&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210627-1-15&t=18&refcode2=850_6688874_XXZPbW&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210627-1-15&t=19&refcode2=850_6688874_XXZPbW&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW)**
---
****
_The Hill_ recently named New Hampshire and Arizona two of the most likely Senate seats to flip, and pundits are predicting that these races could shatter spending records.
The future is bright, but we have critical work ahead of us to expand access to affordable health care and create economic opportunities for hard-working families. [**If you can, please split a $3 contribution between my and Mark Kelly’s people-powered campaigns,**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-jun21?refcode=em210627-1-15&t=20&refcode2=850_6688874_XXZPbW&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW)
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=21&akid=850%2E6688874%2EXXZPbW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Hello, We’re in a bit of a tough spot, so Mark suggested I reach out to you as one of his top supporters. You see, National Republicans only need to flip one seat to take control of the U.S. Senate — and Mark and I are at the top of their list of targets. Mitch McConnell and his right-wing allies are already spending big on attack ads, and public polls are showing tight, single-digit races. Control of the Senate could come down to New Hampshire and Arizona. We check our fundraising numbers every day and in races this close, with the stakes this high, we’re going to need every dollar we can get. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** The Hill recently named New Hampshire and Arizona two of the most likely Senate seats to flip, and pundits are predicting that these races could shatter spending records. The future is bright, but we have critical work ahead of us to expand access to affordable health care and create economic opportunities for hard-working families. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: 🚨Mark Your Calendars for July 3rd! 🚨

body:
Thank you for all your support so far in my race to represent Alabama in the U.S. Senate!
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.

| Peter, Thank you for all your support so far in my race to represent Alabama in the U.S. Senate! Campaign season is underway and the future of our country hangs in the balance. You know what that means \-- it’s time to break out your walking shoes! On July 3rd, we need every patriot we can muster to join us in the Potato Festival Parade to walk alongside our MAGA Train. Please RSVP as soon as possible so we can get an accurate headcount and ensure we have enough sign-making materials to go around! If you’re in the area or willing to make the drive, join us at 9am on July 3rd at Limon’s Mexican Restaurant on 50 Lloyd Crye Drive in Henagar. We’ll gather at Limon’s to make signs and distribute materials before the hour-long parade begins at 10am. If you can, bring your own poster board and markers just in case we have a larger turnout than expected! In celebration of Independence Day, we ask that everyone dress in Red, White, and Blue, or your favorite Mo Brooks for Senate campaign t-shirt. To RSVP, just send an email to: [info@mobrooks.com](mailto:info@mobrooks.com) Hope to see you there! In Liberty, Mo Brooks P.S. We’ll be passing out a *LIMITED NUMBER* of Mo Brooks for Senate flags, so make sure you come early and bring a friend!

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: "Why the heck does John Fetterman's campaign keep emailing me?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The political media would jump at the chance to publish a story about our campaign falling short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal of $100,000.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210627-1860-header&t=1&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)
You might be wondering: _What's an FEC deadline anyway, and why the heck does John Fetterman's campaign keep emailing me?_
Well, Peter, this is the actual reason why. ⤵️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21330?refcode=em20210627-1860&t=2&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)
Immediately after the end of every quarter, the FEC legally requires us to publish our fundraising numbers. **Our opponents, reporters, and the GOP will all be looking closely for any sign our campaign is slowing down.** The political media would jump at the chance to publish a story about our campaign falling short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal of $100,000.
So, we're emailing you to ask for your help to make sure that doesn’t happen. With all eyes on our people-powered movement, we simply have to ask you:
[**_Will you donate your first $5 before Wednesday's end-of-quarter deadline to help elect John Fetterman to the Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21330?refcode=em20210627-1860&t=3&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz) _This deadline is SO important, that John and Gisele have agreed to personally call a few of the folks who chip in before Wednesday at midnight to say thank you. Because they know donating to a campaign is a big deal._
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21330?refcode=em20210627-1860&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)**
The moment the FEC reports go live, our opponents and the press will be looking eagerly to see exactly how much we've raised, as well as how many grassroots supporters are proud to be with John in this fight to flip this open Senate seat.
They'll see this report as a sign of what kind of campaign we'll be able to build — and a sign of whether we have what it takes to go toe-to-toe with the PA GOP.
[**_So, Peter, can you contribute your very first $5 before Wednesday's end-of-quarter deadline? If you do, you might want to start answering any phone calls you get from a PA number — it could be John and Gisele!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21330?refcode=em20210627-1860&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjf-email-20210627%3Frefcode%3Dem20210627-1860&t=23&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21330?refcode=em20210627-1860&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)**
Thank you for everything,
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210627-1860-footer&t=25&refcode2=1860_434096_TloNZz&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1860%2E434096%2ETloNZz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: If at least every one in three people who open this email can contribute, we’ll make up our lost ground in no time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our work is only possible because of the support and dedication from individuals like you who believe in Alexandria’s vision of a more equitable future for all.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210627-2246-header&t=1&akid=2246%2E2526796%2ERW6IVX)
Unlike most other politicians, Alexandria doesn’t spend her time schmoozing for donations from big donors over the phone or at exclusive events. All of her time and energy is dedicated to serving her community and working people across the country.
We instead fundraise through online donations from supporters who give $5 or $10 at a time through emails like these, so Alexandria can stay focused on fighting for bold legislation, organizing our communities, and standing up against the powerful special interests.
But to be totally honest, fundraising has slowed down a bit during these summer months. So to fill the gap, **it’s critical that we ramp up fundraising in the next five days to hit our goal of 106,617 contributions before the official FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on June 30.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210627-2?refcode=em20210627-2-2246-P&t=24&refcode2=2246_2526796_RW6IVX&akid=2246%2E2526796%2ERW6IVX)
**If at least every one in three people who open this email chips in, we’ll make up our lost ground in no time.** But we know not everyone is in the place to give today — and we completely understand.
[If you’re able to pitch in today, it would help guarantee we have the resources to back Alexandria and keep her in Congress fighting for working families. Can you contribute any amount right now to power our campaign and get us to our goal before June 30?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210627-2?refcode=em20210627-2-2246-P&t=44&refcode2=2246_2526796_RW6IVX&akid=2246%2E2526796%2ERW6IVX)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210627-2?refcode=em20210627-2-2246-P&t=45&refcode2=2246_2526796_RW6IVX&akid=2246%2E2526796%2ERW6IVX)**
Our work is only possible because of the support and dedication from individuals like you who believe in Alexandria’s vision of a more equitable future for all.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210627-2?refcode=em20210627-2246-P&t=46&refcode2=2246_2526796_RW6IVX&akid=2246%2E2526796%2ERW6IVX)**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: coming up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CeQUXyUm70OOTL2pq2aNe7PosbNqUicO&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
I know there's a lot going on right now, but I need your attention for just a minute, because this is important: **Our quarterly FEC deadline is just a few days away, and we 're on track to come up short of our critical $30,000 goal.**
There's so much on the line here: Democrats have a razor-thin margin of control - and the risks of relapse to a McConnell-led Senate are just too horrifying to consider. He and his extremist followers are counting on us to be easy targets: easy to distract and destroy so they can expand their voter suppression scheme, pack the courts with right-wing judges, take away reproductive rights, and undermine the rule of law.
Democrats need to keep _every single seat_ to defend our democracy from right-wing extremism and make life better for families across America. Supporters like you have already helped me pass the NO HATE Act to combat hate crimes, introduce the Women's Health Protection Act to defend reproductive rights, and sponsor the American Dream and Promise Act to reform our broken immigration system. We'll be able to do so much more if we maintain control of the Senate next election.
**The National Republican Senatorial Committee is already targeting my seat, and it 's going to take every bit of grassroots support to protect Democratic control of the Senate. [That's why I need your help today, Friend. Will you donate $5 by midnight tonight to help us reach our $30,000 goal before the FEC deadline, keep the Senate blue, and stop GOP extremism?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1044-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&amount=5)**
I really appreciate your support,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1044-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=o75MdAc1K2a4clhlbUxsFLs6H%2B6HfeHg&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Patty Murray
subject: I'm personally asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
With voting rights under attack around the country, the Senate had the opportunity this past week to protect our voting rights -- a pillar of our democracy -- with the For the People Act.
#
Peter,
With voting rights under attack around the country, the Senate had the opportunity this past week to protect our voting rights -- a pillar of our democracy -- with the For the People Act.
Shamefully, Senate Republicans filibustered the bill. But the fight for our democracy isn’t over.
**Right now, we’re just a few days away from the end of the quarter, and this is our chance to show the GOP that we’re building a movement to defend and expand our majority. I’ve set a $10,000 fundraising goal and here’s why I need you to pitch in and help us reach it:**
**[Handing control of the Senate back to Mitch McConnell and the Republicans is not an option. We need to keep this seat -- and the Senate. Rush in $1 before the deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31501186/292859655/-1246566674?refcode=pm_em_210627_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjFmYmM0NC04ZmQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4kgU2FEQugVIjbLlwYrmemkFA-zAaXCAQ7UHT3IoLE=)**
I’m doing everything I can in the other Washington to make progress on issues like voting rights, child care, paid leave, the climate crisis, health care, housing and so many other urgent issues families and communities are facing. But everything we’re working for is at stake if the Republicans take back the Senate in 2022.
That’s why it’s absolutely necessary for us to meet this crucial goal by the end of the quarter.
**[Pitch in $1 or any amount right now to help meet this goal and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31501187/292859656/-1246566674?refcode=pm_em_210627_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjFmYmM0NC04ZmQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z4kgU2FEQugVIjbLlwYrmemkFA-zAaXCAQ7UHT3IoLE=)**
Thank you,
Patty

clean_body: With voting rights under attack around the country, the Senate had the opportunity this past week to protect our voting rights -- a pillar of our democracy -- with the For the People Act. Peter, With voting rights under attack around the country, the Senate had the opportunity this past week to protect our voting rights -- a pillar of our democracy -- with the For the People Act. Shamefully, Senate Republicans filibustered the bill. But the fight for our democracy isn’t over. Right now, we’re just a few days away from the end of the quarter, and this is our chance to show the GOP that we’re building a movement to defend and expand our majority. I’ve set a $10,000 fundraising goal and here’s why I need you to pitch in and help us reach it: = I’m doing everything I can in the other Washington to make progress on issues like voting rights, child care, paid leave, the climate crisis, health care, housing and so many other urgent issues families and communities are facing. But everything we’re working for is at stake if the Republicans take back the Senate in 2022. That’s why it’s absolutely necessary for us to meet this crucial goal by the end of the quarter. = Thank you, Patty = As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

We’re just a few days out from our big quarterly fundraising deadline, folks. I know my team has emailed you a couple times about this deadline already, so I want to take a minute to explain why it’s so important. At the end of each fiscal quarter, our campaign fundraising numbers become publicly available through the FEC. And as soon as that happens, politicos, pundits, and the media pore through our forms to see how strong our movement is — and those working to reverse our progress will look for any vulnerabilities they can exploit. Fundraising deadlines also help us plan our budget for the coming months. After each quarter, my team and I sit down and determine our spending for the next three months. name: Team Crist
subject: the Koch network is praising Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Republicans are already spending big to protect DeSantis because they know we can beat him.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/V8Y3jsxcwY67PEqyzB4ppw==/nOicqLmgckbhgKKmD1LayQ==?refcode=20210627_f_1_fl&amount=25)
---
Friend,

The race for Florida governor just got more interesting:

A new ad campaign backed by none other than **the Koch network is praising Ron DeSantis** for his record as governor! We don't know about you, but in our eyes a bungled COVID response and a pattern of prioritizing the interests of wealthy communities over everyday Floridians is nothing to be proud of.

To make matters worse, a new, right-wing platform called _El American_ has begun publishing pro-DeSantis content targeting Latino voters in Florida. They're backed by a shadowy group of investors and use language that makes even _FOX News_ look moderate in comparison.

These are just two of many examples of right-wing media outlets promoting disinformation in an effort to sway opinions and influence elections. **We are going to need all the help we can get to keep our messaging out there and combat these deceitful actions by right-wing media outlets.**
[PITCH IN TO HELP US CORRECT THE RECORD
AND DEFEAT DESANTIS](https://act.myngp.com/el/V8Y3jsxcwY67PEqyzB4ppw==/nOicqLmgckbhgKKmD1LayQ==?refcode=20210627_f_1_fl&amount=25)
---
Here's the deal: Republicans are already spending big to protect DeSantis because **they know we can beat him**. And while groups like the Koch network and _El American_ may have nearly unlimited amounts of money at their disposal, we have something even better: Grassroots support from people like _you_.

We can beat DeSantis, but **we need you in our corner** to make it happen. A grassroots organization needs resources to pay for everything from clipboards, pens, and paper -- to ads on TV, radio, and the internet. And every single donation, no matter how small, adds up to make a big difference.

**So friend, if you 're able, please pitch in today to help us fight back against DeSantis and his big money allies so we can finally build a Florida for all Floridians:**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/V8Y3jsxcwY67PEqyzB4ppw==/nOicqLmgckbhgKKmD1LayQ==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210627_f_1_fl&amount=5)

[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/V8Y3jsxcwY67PEqyzB4ppw==/nOicqLmgckbhgKKmD1LayQ==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210627_f_1_fl&amount=100)

Thank you,

Team Crist

name: Team Hayes
subject: The Real Work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
You may have seen that the attacks are already flying fast against Jahana Hayes. National Republicans and special interest groups have launched multi-million dollar ad campaigns against a handful of Democrats in target districts, including Jahana. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31503040/292865270/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjU0ODYzYi05N2Q3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vRTVDaUnwiRSjyDL23HbS5nLE3HfkBDb8pySbKAAFY=&emci=1af3f707-c4d5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f654863b-97d7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15529135) | You may have seen that the attacks are already flying fast against Jahana Hayes. National Republicans and special interest groups have launched multi-million dollar ad campaigns against a handful of Democrats in target districts, including Jahana. **But as always, our campaign is focused on letting the facts speak for themselves, communicating Jahana’s work and her vision for a better future for everyone. We are trafficking in truth, and we are confident the people of CT-05 will notice. Take a look at these headlines:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31503041/292865271/1522229062?refcode=E9396-20210627-EOQ2-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjU0ODYzYi05N2Q3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vRTVDaUnwiRSjyDL23HbS5nLE3HfkBDb8pySbKAAFY=) The COVID-19 crisis exposed the cracks and vulnerabilities in our society and infrastructure. Vulnerable communities bore the brunt of both a global pandemic AND the resulting economic crisis. _Now, we need leaders who are committed to moving towards solutions, so we can heal and build systems that work for ALL people._ Jahana is hard at work doing just that. While the GOP railed against much-needed relief for Americans, Democrats passed the historic American Rescue Plan. **Now, Republicans are desperate to flip the 5th District and unseat Jahana – because they know she is a leader who understands everyday struggles more than most. They know she is a leader who legislates from a place of responsibility and decency. And they know that is exactly what the residents of CT-05 want in their representative.** [**Representation matters. We need real people like Jahana in Congress, who have lived experiences that benefit ALL of us. We are trafficking in truth, and we are confident the people of CT-05 will notice. Take a look at these headlines: = The COVID-19 crisis exposed the cracks and vulnerabilities in our society and infrastructure. While the GOP railed against much-needed relief for Americans, Democrats passed the historic American Rescue Plan. Now, Republicans are desperate to flip the 5th District and unseat Jahana – because they know she is a leader who understands everyday struggles more than most. body:
Have you seen Jimmy's message regarding our important end of quarter fundraising goal? We have over $20,000 to raise by Wednesday June 30th. **[Please, chip in here and read on to hear from Jimmy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zXw5HoNYJGV-Jpgl2BVaQdNtBSbNUrbePL33tXZLAc=/4fqC78eSvgymvCMiUFleKV61f2kXtwHIkdeDyihG9h0=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210627_1_2)**

**_\---Original Message from Jimmy Panetta---_** | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zXw5HoNYJGV-Jpgl2BVaQdNtBSbNUrbePL33tXZLAc=/4fqC78eSvgymvCMiUFleKV61f2kXtwHIkdeDyihG9h0=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210627_1_2)

Peter,

The June FEC deadline is approaching quickly, and I need your help.

Redistricting is right around the corner, and California is going to be crucial to holding the House for Democrats. A lot is at stake depending on redistricting -- districts controlled by Democrats could become much more competitive.

[We have an end of quarter fundraising goal of $23,216 that we can't afford to miss. Will you chip in $15 or more today before the June 30th FEC deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zXw5HoNYJGV-Jpgl2BVaQdNtBSbNUrbePL33tXZLAc=/4fqC78eSvgymvCMiUFleKV61f2kXtwHIkdeDyihG9h0=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210627_1_2)

| **[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zXw5HoNYJGV-Jpgl2BVaQdNtBSbNUrbePL33tXZLAc=/4fqC78eSvgymvCMiUFleKV61f2kXtwHIkdeDyihG9h0=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210627_1_2)**
---

After the FEC deadline, our fundraising numbers go public, which means all eyes will be on us to see if we've kept up our momentum so far this year. If there are any signs of weakness, opponents looking to take back seats in the 2022 midterm elections **will** take notice.

I don't like bugging you for money, Peter, but this fundraising goal is too important to miss. [Please, chip in any amount you can to help Democrats hold the House in next year's midterm elections.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zXw5HoNYJGV-Jpgl2BVaQdNtBSbNUrbePL33tXZLAc=/4fqC78eSvgymvCMiUFleKV61f2kXtwHIkdeDyihG9h0=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210627_1_2)

Your constant support means so much to me. Thank you.

-- Jimmy Panetta

**[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/0zXw5HoNYJGV-Jpgl2BVaQdNtBSbNUrbePL33tXZLAc=/4fqC78eSvgymvCMiUFleKV61f2kXtwHIkdeDyihG9h0=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210627_1_2)**

body:
Where we are and what it means.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31504508/292869526/-2023814932?refcode=20210627.3_EW_CG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmE5N2RkMi05ZGQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uftBzOzl6CYlLO5j0ohrkq76FJnUDEF3z6b0fXTVEKA=)

| | Derek, I know you’ve been hearing from us a lot lately, so I’ll keep this short. The progress we were making towards our end-of-quarter fundraising goal has stalled and we’re falling behind. We’re _still_ 4,329 donations short of our goal.

We’ve got a long way to go and not a lot of time to do it.

name: 2022 SENATE UPDATE (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: If we fall short, Dems could lose the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team -- control of the Senate could be decided in New Hampshire. Maggie Hassan only won by 1,017 votes in 2016. Democrats have a slim 50-50 Senate majority, so a single loss will hand power back to Mitch McConnell. **And back-to-back polls of New Hampshire show Maggie down.** New Hampshire is shaping up to be the most competitive race of 2022. Just last year, Joe Biden won the state by a single-digit margin -- but the GOP governor won by a wide margin and Republicans flipped both chambers of the state legislature. **So when we say New Hampshire is a swing state, we mean it.** Falling short isn’t an option, folks. Republicans and election experts have been calling Maggie **the most vulnerable Democratic incumbent,** and if we don’t report strong numbers at the end of the month, it’ll only welcome more attacks. Our major FEC deadline is just three days away and we’ve missed our email goals every day this month. We set an emergency weekend fundraising goal to close the gap, but we’re still $7,316 short. **[Can you rush $5, $25, or whatever you can to get us across the finish line?
