body:
Team,

In just three days, we're going up against our FEC end-of-quarter deadline. We set a goal of raising $15,000 to help Karen defend the House majority, and right now, we're still $3,895 short:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YuHnEQ3DI2Z52ggAR8ebJDg39NSqlKu2HPS8WUAirms=/tYRSvvEqbpQxP9Hy0vMvMwndXCYupwNP9_Bq2zEDeSE=?gpsid=39_132_19524&refcode=em21_210627_eoq1_fnd_gq_kkr__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210627_eoq1_fnd_gq_kkr__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Every little bit goes toward defending the Democratic majority and Karen's fight for social and economic justice in Congress »](https://act.myngp.com/el/YuHnEQ3DI2Z52ggAR8ebJDg39NSqlKu2HPS8WUAirms=/tYRSvvEqbpQxP9Hy0vMvMwndXCYupwNP9_Bq2zEDeSE=?gpsid=39_132_19524&refcode=em21_210627_eoq1_fnd_gq_kkr__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210627_eoq1_fnd_gq_kkr__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Karen Bass** <info@karenbass.com>
Date: Fri, Jun 25, 2021
Subject: can I ask you a favor?
Hello,

Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline is in only five days, team. I'm reaching out to our top supporters (you!) to get a head start on our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal.

Already, national Republicans are flooding vulnerable districts across the country with outside spending. At the same time, GOP politicians at the state level are passing voter suppression laws left and right. And they're gerrymandering districts in their favor to try and take back the House.

**I 'll be honest -- if we plan to hang on to our vulnerable Democratic House majority, we can't miss this end-of-quarter goal.** The road to victory in 2022 starts now, and I'm asking:

**[To help us have a strong quarter, will you chip in now before the FEC deadline? Even $5 or $10 will help our team get closer to our goal, so please donate what you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/YuHnEQ3DI2Z52ggAR8ebJDg39NSqlKu2HPS8WUAirms=/tYRSvvEqbpQxP9Hy0vMvMwndXCYupwNP9_Bq2zEDeSE=?gpsid=39_132_19524&refcode=em21_210627_eoq1_fnd_gq_kkr__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210627_eoq1_fnd_gq_kkr__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Our majority is hanging on by just five seats. But more importantly, our progressive movement for social and economic justice is on the line too.

If we want to keep fighting for affordable health care, an end to the housing crisis, student loan forgiveness, climate justice, and more -- protecting the House is vital. **I 'm leaning on this team more than ever before**, and it's why I'm sending you emails like this one.

**[I know we can hit our ambitious end-of-quarter goal and shore up the funds we need to defend the House, but I can't do it alone. subject: POLL: Do you still support Trump?

body:
| Fellow American,

Despite the Democrats doing everything in their power to reverse all our America First progress - Republican voters still believe in President Trump and the job he did Making America Great Again!

Take a look at a few of President Trump’s wins, Fellow American:
1. Strengthened our military
2. Rebuilt of economy
3. Fortified our border
4. Held China accountable
5. Protected our Second Amendment rights
6. Lowered our taxes

body:
As a way of saying thank you for chipping in ahead of a crucial FEC deadline, I’m going to personally call a few grassroots supporters who help us get over the top.
#
Peter, this Wednesday marks an important end-of-quarter deadline for our campaign.
At the end of every quarter, our campaign has to file a mandatory fundraising report with the Federal Elections Commission (FEC). It probably comes as no surprise, but the total amount you raise, and the specific amount of individual people who donate to you, is a huge indicator of our strength — and what we can accomplish in the weeks ahead.
_It’s vital that we hit our goal — not only to prove that the state of our movement is strong but also to fuel our organizing for transformative change across this country._ **So as a way of saying thank you for chipping in ahead of this crucial deadline, I’m going to personally call a few grassroots supporters who help us get over the finish line.**
[**Peter, will you chip in $3 or any amount to help us reach our $150,000 FEC deadline goal before Wednesday night? If you do, you might just get a call from me as a special way of saying thank you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210627?refcode=em20210627-411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=411_420207_sHFbGN&akid=411%2E420207%2EsHFbGN)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210627?refcode=em20210627-411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=411_420207_sHFbGN&akid=411%2E420207%2EsHFbGN)**
Because our campaign doesn’t take a dime from corporate interests, we rely entirely on grassroots supporters like you. In fact, a sizable chunk of our fundraising comes from emails just like this one, from people like YOU.
That’s exactly why it’s so important to set aside this time to connect. And we can talk about whatever you want — our fight to end the filibuster, a wealth tax, Medicare for All, or perhaps even sharing funny stories about our pets! But most importantly, I’ll be sure to personally thank you for your generous contribution.
[**If you’d like to hear from me, chip in toward our $150,000 FEC deadline goal before midnight Wednesday and you could be one of the supporters I call. Be sure to include a number I can reach you at, turn your ringer on, and you just might hear from me.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210627?refcode=em20210627-411&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=411_420207_sHFbGN&akid=411%2E420207%2EsHFbGN)
Hope to talk to you soon,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210627-411-footer&t=23&refcode2=411_420207_sHFbGN&akid=411%2E420207%2EsHFbGN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=411%2E420207%2EsHFbGN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=411%2E420207%2EsHFbGN)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Extends Emergency to August – Action Needed
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Governor Walz did the unthinkable. He just announced that he’ll hold onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers until August.** This makes me incredibly mad - as I hope it does to you. I’ve long tried to suppress my emotions during this Constitutional Crisis disguised as an “Emergency”. I needed a clear head to lead this fight. But what Walz, and cowardly Republicans senators are doing, is angering me to the bone. **Even Governor Cuomo gave up his powers...and he is from the state with the most densely populated city in the U.S.!** We thought last week that things were turning for the better. Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka made multiple statements he was going to ensure that Walz’ Emergency Powers would end. But then the Great Gazelka Sellout began and Senate Republicans started passing half of the budget bills that fund Walz’ government agencies to attack our businesses. Now here we stand, with just days left before the July 1st “deadline” and Walz is getting everything he wants. **Walz Checklist**
* **Keep Emergency Powers**
* **No Never Again Bill**
* **State taxpayers[pay for Minneapolis riot damage](https://www.action4liberty.com/your_tax_money_will_pay_for_riot_damage_in_minneapolis_thanks_to_gazelka_deal?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=2)**
* **California Clear Car Mandate**
* **Grow government by 10%**
* **Increase government school funding**
* **Keep taxes one of the highest in the nation**

And what did Gazelka deliver for us? **Absolutely NOTHING!** But rest assured, he’ll say Republicans stopped worse things from happening; so you better vote Republican in next election time.
## Are you sick of this con yet?
And what about Republicans in the Minnesota House? They put on a good show last week when they filibustered a couple budget bills. But it was a ploy for them to get a one year renewal of the Insurance Company Bailouts. House Minority Leader Kurt Daudt said on the House floor that it was Republican’s top priority. Top priority? You have got to be kidding me! To make matters worse, we found out that Rep Daudt, who is employed by a Washington D.C. lobbying firm that lists pharmaceutical companies as clients, is [featured in paid advertisements encouraging Minnesotans to get vaccinated](https://www.action4liberty.com/lobbyist_legislator_daudt_featured_in_get_your_vaccine_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=3). These are the people fighting for us??? No wonder why nothing gets done. We have one shot left to make sure Paul Gazelka and Republicans don’t complete the Great Gazelka Sell Out. There’s still time left to STOP the other half of the budget. Don’t let them enter these final days without hearing from you. **Tell your legislators to STOP passing budget bills until Walz’ Emergency Powers are terminated. If they don’t do that, then make sure they know you'll do everything in your power to expose them at election time. Remember - they work for YOU!**
## [SEE WHO REPRESENTS ME](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=4)
If they don't hear from you, that sends a signal to them that you are willing to put up with all of this without political consequence. You and I need to pressure these RINOs and show them we mean business. **And that we won't stand for the Great Gazelka Sellout.** When they realize they'll pay a massive political price for their misdeeds, they have to think if this is the political fight they are willing to lose. So call now and tell them: STOP passing the remaining budget until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated! With your engagement in this battle we can force these politicians to deliver for us. **Don’t like making the calls or writing the emails. I get it, it’s not for all of us. We still have a team of phone callers at Action 4 Liberty headquarters, so help us keep them on the phones with a[donation today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=5).** **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_extends_to_aug&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Jon Stewart
subject: Just over 36 hours
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

I’m Jon, Nikki’s Deputy Finance Director. Before we start the week, I want to give you an update on where we stand.

We just crunched the numbers, and we need to raise another $38,963 online before Wednesday at midnight to hit our June goal.

Click here to chip in now and help us finish the month strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/enfeom?refcode=sun]

Our first month fundraising numbers are critically important. Ron DeSantis and the Florida GOP have been attacking Nikki since day one of this campaign. Every penny we raise helps us fend them off and amplify our own message.

Ron DeSantis has a virtually unlimited warchest from national Republican donors to attack Nikki. We need to raise as much money as possible early in this race to ensure we can compete.

Team, we don’t like to keep asking, but Wednesday at midnight is one of our campa ign’s most important deadlines. If you are in a position to give, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/enfeom?refcode=sun]

Thanks for standing with Nikki in the fight to bring something new to Tallahassee.

Best,

Jon Stewart
Deputy Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Flip CA-25
subject: This is who Mike Garcia really is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31507176/292895504/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA2Nzk0OC1hZWQ3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6LHUhkpe-84G6eUmbU9ZQHxJVNocdyCUZbHOHrGz_0=&emci=fcec9ce7-dbd5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f067948-aed7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Mike Garcia's time in Congress has been full of nothing but obstruction. He has made it clear that he's not going to follow through on his promises to be a thoughtful bipartisan leader.

For Mike Garcia, his political ambition and loyalty to Trump are way more important than this congressional district's well-being and success.

**That's why he's been cozying up to some of the most extreme and dangerous members of the Republican Party, like Marjorie Taylor Greene.** That's why he has been such an unproductive legislator in Congress. That's why he has not improved his awful record of not introducing any new legislation in Congress. That's why he almost always votes with his Republican friends and has no interest in working across the aisle.

**[Peter, Mike Garcia is not going to change. This is who he is. That's why we need your help to unseat him. clean_body: If you’re ready to see a true leader in Congress, will you sign on to endorse my bid for Congress? | Hello there! Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please . = My name is Eric Gash. I've served my community as a pastor, a school principal, and a football coach. Now, I'm running as a Democrat to give North Carolina's 11th congressional district the leader it deserves in Congress. | I've dedicated my life to serving my community. So I cannot stay silent and let our current radical representative sow even more division among us. In such a turbulent time, we need a community leader who understands their constituents, builds bridges between different perspectives, and elevates everyone's voices to the floor of Congress. But Madison Cawthorn is the far-right's darling, and it'll take all the grassroots support we can get to take him down. Your early support will go a long way towards bolstering our movement. In solidarity, Eric Gash | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. Madison Cawthorn. Cawthorn is an utter failure for the working families he represents, and is more focused on serving himself and the MAGA base than the good people of this district. Eric Gash is the leader we need to restore integrity to this seat. Please, consider making a =. body:

---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2cd64335a3&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, Worthless RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger are condemning me for asking who executed Senior Airman Ashli Babbitt. That’s how you know I’m on your side.
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0486ba4ee6&e=645b3b1338) **[Those two fake Republicans voted to impeach President Trump in defiance of the Constitution](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=297473191c&e=645b3b1338). ** Cheney and Kinzinger support the imprisonment and solitary confinement of Trump supporters -- being held without bail -- in D.C. for trespassing at the Capitol. They support the coverup of Senior Airman Babbitt’s murder. That’s because they hate the America First movement, they hate me, and they hate you. But I don’t care. Those RINO babies can cry and moan all they want. But they’re not going to stop our groundswell effort to hold the perpetrators for the violence on January 6th accountable. **[Click here to sign your “Justice for Ashli Babbitt” petition that we will use to inundate Congress](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dd68f7d4cf&e=645b3b1338).**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=493de1f069&e=645b3b1338 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
| [**After you sign, please forward this petition to at least five of your patriotic friends and family to sign before our hearing deadline**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=728f005661&e=645b3b1338). If losers like Cheney and Kinzinger spent half as much time fighting Democrats as they do fighting real Patriots like you and me, the GOP would be in a much better place. But they’d rather lose. Their corporate donors and D.C. Swamp backers demand that they cave to globalism instead of serving the fine Americans who elected them. **I am not like them. ** You might remember that President Trump called me a “warrior” when he endorsed me. [**I’m in the trenches demanding justice for Ashli Babbit and all United States Service Members**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b6ddb21ef1&e=645b3b1338). [_**So please, if you OPPOSE the federal government _‘COVERING UP THE MURDER OF ASHLI BABBIT,’_ please sign your EMERGENCY PETITION right now**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3682a48dad&e=645b3b1338)! But I need your support right away. The Kinzinger and Cheney types in D.C. -- donor owned and operated globalist elites who hate the America First movement, President Trump, and regular folks like you and me -- are going all-in to defeat me. They’ve openly said I’m one of their biggest targets. [**That's why it's vital you take action**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5d914f05b5&e=645b3b1338). [**Sign your petition and chip in $10 or $20 to help us keep the petition printers humming**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=98230a2bea&e=645b3b1338). Thanks -- in advance -- for your action and support. Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9838ea788a&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** Weak RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger are condemning me. Their policies have been a disaster for the American people, so I wear it as a badge of honor.

But the RINOs in D.C. are going to fight hard to take me out, because I support the America First movement -- [**sign your petition right away to demand justice for Ashli Babbitt and all United States service members**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7a0274bf67&e=645b3b1338). .
